title: Berchemiella wilsonii
taxonomy: Berchemiella wilsonii is a genus of flowering plants in the family Rhamnaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. The plant is further classified under the order Rosales and family Rhamnaceae. Berchemiella wilsonii is native to China, specifically in the province of Sichuan. The classification is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
